Da la hora

Source: R/tiemp.R
what_time.Rd

Da la hora

Usage

what_time(language = "es")

Arguments

language

Idioma, o "es" o "en"

Value

Una frase

Examples

what_time()
#> [1] "Mmhm! Ahora son las 19:38!"
what_time("en")
#> [1] "Hmm! It is 19:38 now!"
